transcription.text: With double-layer design for dependable protection, a comfortable plastic applicator, a deodorant for freshness, a special plastic wrap so they won't open in your purse, Playtex tampons give you what you want and more.

segments.text: With double-layer design for dependable protection, a comfortable plastic applicator, a deodorant for freshness, a special plastic wrap so they won't open in your purse, Playtex tampons give you what you want and more.
